item.title: Hitachi ZX225 Idler Repair
item.description: A worn Hitachi ZX225 track idler is rebuilt and restored to keep the excavator operating reliably in demanding conditions.

media:content.media:title: Hitachi ZX225 Idler Repair
media:content.media:description: A worn Hitachi ZX225 track idler is rebuilt and restored to keep the excavator operating reliably in demanding conditions.

item.title: First Lathe Service and Maintenance
item.description: The workshop's lathe receives its first major service, ensuring smooth operation, improved accuracy, and long-term reliability.

media:content.media:title: First Lathe Service and Maintenance
media:content.media:description: The workshop's lathe receives its first major service, ensuring smooth operation, improved accuracy, and long-term reliability.

item.title: Cracked Final Drive Spindle Repair
item.description: A cracked final drive spindle is repaired with precision machining and welding to return the component to working condition.

media:content.media:title: Cracked Final Drive Spindle Repair
media:content.media:description: A cracked final drive spindle is repaired with precision machining and welding to return the component to working condition.

item.title: Repairing a Damaged Cylinder Eye
item.description: A damaged hydraulic cylinder eye is rebuilt through machining and welding, restoring its strength and service life.

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Damaged Cylinder Eye
media:content.media:description: A damaged hydraulic cylinder eye is rebuilt through machining and welding, restoring its strength and service life.

item.title: Removing a Seized Nut with Precision
item.description: A stubborn seized nut is carefully removed using precision machining techniques to prevent damage to the surrounding components.

media:content.media:title: Removing a Seized Nut with Precision
media:content.media:description: A stubborn seized nut is carefully removed using precision machining techniques to prevent damage to the surrounding components.

item.title: Machining a Large Cylinder Rod for Hitachi EX1900
item.description: A massive hydraulic cylinder rod for a Hitachi EX1900 is machined to exact specifications for reliable heavy equipment performance.

media:content.media:title: Machining a Large Cylinder Rod for Hitachi EX1900
media:content.media:description: A massive hydraulic cylinder rod for a Hitachi EX1900 is machined to exact specifications for reliable heavy equipment performance.

item.title: Mining Truck Dog Bone Repair on a Bed Mill
item.description: A worn mining truck suspension component is repaired on a bed mill using precision machining to restore strength and accuracy.

media:content.media:title: Mining Truck Dog Bone Repair on a Bed Mill
media:content.media:description: A worn mining truck suspension component is repaired on a bed mill using precision machining to restore strength and accuracy.

item.title: Franna Crane Custom Drive Coupling
item.description: A custom drive coupling is machined and fitted for a Franna crane, restoring reliable power transfer and heavy-duty performance.

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Custom Drive Coupling
media:content.media:description: A custom drive coupling is machined and fitted for a Franna crane, restoring reliable power transfer and heavy-duty performance.

item.title: Making a Big Lathe Tool Post
item.description: A heavy-duty lathe tool post is custom-built to improve machining accuracy, rigidity, and performance for large-scale workshop projects

media:content.media:title: Making a Big Lathe Tool Post
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty lathe tool post is custom-built to improve machining accuracy, rigidity, and performance for large-scale workshop projects

item.title: Bulldozer Blade Repair and Restoration
item.description: A worn bulldozer blade is restored through precision machining, welding, and reinforcement to prepare it for demanding heavy-duty work.

media:content.media:title: Bulldozer Blade Repair and Restoration
media:content.media:description: A worn bulldozer blade is restored through precision machining, welding, and reinforcement to prepare it for demanding heavy-duty work.

item.title: Forklift Cylinder Repair and Inspection
item.description: A forklift hydraulic cylinder is disassembled, inspected, and repaired to restore smooth operation and dependable lifting performance.

media:content.media:title: Forklift Cylinder Repair and Inspection
media:content.media:description: A forklift hydraulic cylinder is disassembled, inspected, and repaired to restore smooth operation and dependable lifting performance.

item.title: Machining and Welding a Dump Truck Suspension Part
item.description: A worn dump truck suspension component is restored through precision machining and expert welding, bringing the heavy-duty part back into service.

media:content.media:title: Machining and Welding a Dump Truck Suspension Part
media:content.media:description: A worn dump truck suspension component is restored through precision machining and expert welding, bringing the heavy-duty part back into service.

item.title: CAT 12m Motor Grader Cylinder Repair
item.description: A custom heavy-duty platform is built to support a large lathe, providing greater stability, safety, and easier operation in the workshop.

media:content.media:title: CAT 12m Motor Grader Cylinder Repair
media:content.media:description: A custom heavy-duty platform is built to support a large lathe, providing greater stability, safety, and easier operation in the workshop.

item.title: A Shop Project That Changed Everything
item.description: A CAT 12M motor grader hydraulic cylinder undergoes a complete repair, restoring its strength and performance for demanding heavy equipment work.

media:content.media:title: A Shop Project That Changed Everything
media:content.media:description: A CAT 12M motor grader hydraulic cylinder undergoes a complete repair, restoring its strength and performance for demanding heavy equipment work.

item.title: Rear Strut Rod Restored to Like-New Condition
item.description: A major workshop project transforms the way jobs are completed, improving efficiency, workflow, and everyday productivity.

media:content.media:title: Rear Strut Rod Restored to Like-New Condition
media:content.media:description: A major workshop project transforms the way jobs are completed, improving efficiency, workflow, and everyday productivity.

item.title: Machining, Welding and Milling in Action
item.description: Watch precision machining, welding, and milling combine to restore and fabricate heavy-duty components with expert craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Machining, Welding and Milling in Action
media:content.media:description: Watch precision machining, welding, and milling combine to restore and fabricate heavy-duty components with expert craftsmanship.
